code: import axios from"axios";const BACKEND_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL||"http://localhost:8000";const API_URL="".concat(BACKEND_URL.replace(/\/$/,""),"/api");const client=axios.create({baseURL:API_URL,timeout:30000});export async function planTrip(payload){const _await$client$post=await client.post("/trips/plan",payload),data=_await$client$post.data;return data;}export async function getTrip(id){const _await$client$get=await client.get("/trips/".concat(id)),data=_await$client$get.data;return data;}export async function listTrips(){const _await$client$get2=await client.get("/trips"),data=_await$client$get2.data;return data;}export async function deleteTrip(id){const _await$client$delete=await client.delete("/trips/".concat(id)),data=_await$client$delete.data;return data;}export{API_URL};
